title: Eldnacele Glass Flickering Flameless Santa Claus Candles with Remote Timer Battery Operated Led Pillar Candles 3 Pack, Santa Sleigh Pattern Real Wax Candles for Christmas Home Decoration
features: Beautiful glass design with cozy Santa scene: An elegant glass jar with pretty patterns and real wax candle inside, where Santa Claus is carrying a sleigh in the snow, full of Christmas ambience. Three-dimensional snow motif in sparkly pattern on glass, so festive and so tastefully done. Warm light LED flame make it more realistic flicker and looks very pretty and cozy. Nobody will be able to tell these from real candles

Remote make you experience more: I didn't think that having a remote for them was such a big deal, but believe me you will love the feeling which be able to pick up the remote and turn them on or off or change the glow. Very easy to use! You will love them if you order them

The timer is a nice feature: 2/4/6/8H timer setting can meet your different need. For example, if you choose 4H mode at 16:00, it will 4hrs on and 20hrs off over each 24hrs period. Much more convenient and necessary to give youself a surprise cozy ambient by the timer mode
Candel set & dimensions: 3 Pacs Santa Claus glass flameless candles in a set, Dia: 3 inch, Height: 4/5/6 inch. One remote with 10 function keys and a super easy to follow operationg manual

Thoughtful gift option: Our led candles make a thoughtful and practical gift for loved ones during the Christmas season. They offer an easy way to add a touch of holiday magic to any home, making them a delightful present for friends and family
description: Product Description OUR BELIEF We have to keep the romance going. No matter how tired we are. The only thing worse than just going through the motions is not being bothering to go through the motions. We believe that ritual is respect for the love of life, and that is why we strive to provide the best products possible. We also believe every trust should not be let down, so we pursue better quality, create more temperature products with soul and purpose. We hope you enjoy our flameless candles! Behind every ritualistic form is an expression of love. 10 KEY REMOTE WITH TIMER & BATTERY OPERATED Product Information: Material: Glass & Real Wax Batteries: 2 x AA batteries required (NOT Included) The remote control requires one CR2025/CR2032 battery (Included). Remote: 10-key remote control Timer: 2/4/6/8H Timer Flame Mode: Flicker Flame/Steady Light Brightness: Brighten/Dimmer Wax Color: White Light Clolor: Warm Light Occasions: PERFECT Christmas Home Party Decoration ! ! ! The Lovely Santa is coming~ PACKAGE INFORMATION: 1 x Santa Glass Flameless Candle(D3" x H4") 1 x Santa Glass Flameless Candle(D3" x H5") 1 x Santa Glass Flameless Candle(D3" x H6") 1 x 10-Key Remote(Battery Included) 1 x User Manual Instruction Eldnacele Glass Flickering Flameless Santa Claus Candles with Remote Timer 2/4/6/8H TIMER MODE HAVE MORE FUN The Christmas flameless candle lights set is equipped with a 10 key remote control which supports you the 2/4/6/8H timer mode experience, adding much more fun and comfort. For example , if you choose the 4H timer at 18:00 and it will turn off themselves at 22:00 automactically, cycles every 24 hours. SAFE & CLEAN LED flameless candle lights avoid the safety issues of the traditional candles, such as the risk of fire danger, the dripping wax bother, the smoke trouble and no matches needed. The glass jar is easy to clean and keep tidy. PERFECT DECORATION AS CHRISTMAS GIFT SET This is an indispensable Christmas candle, which can easily bring out the warm Christmas atmosphere for you. The warm flashing candlelight hits the glass, and the reflection of the glass is more shining. The pattern of Santa Claus driving a sleigh is timeless, and the raised snowflake pattern on the surface of the glass makes the whole more vivid. Warm Tips: Please slide the switch on the bottom of the candles to turn on the light first, then you can use the remote control. There will be slight battery drain in remote or timer mode. If you do not plan to use them frequently, you'd better turn off them from the bottom switch.
